summary: Frontend testing of Landing page multi-language translations. All 7 languages (EN, ES, FR, PT, DE, IT, ZH) are working correctly. Language selector dropdown functions properly and all sections translate correctly when switching languages.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Landing page translations fully working for all 7 languages. All sections (Hero, Features, AI Features, Presentations, Customization, Integrations, Homeschool, Footer) translate correctly.

details: Language selector button visible in header with data-testid='language-selector-btn'
All 7 language options present: en, es, fr, pt, de, it, zh
Each option has data-testid='lang-option-{code}' for testing
